text: - Radius - 5 Miles 10 Miles 25 Miles 50 Miles 100 Miles Search by Provider Name > New Search > Food > Community Meals * Homeless Men 1 Matching Service Providers The mapped locations are estimates, for the exact location of an individual site, select "More Details" Refine Results - Select - No Filter At Risk Youth Homeless Men Homeless Youth Accessibility Options - Select - No Filter Wheelchair Access (Full) Wheelchair Access (Partial) Accessible Parking (Private Lot) Accessible Parking (Nearby Public/Street Parking) Accessible Restrooms Alternative Communication Formats Virtual Service Options Staff Trained in Disability Awareness Print & Share All Results X Print & Share Print PDF UNION GOSPEL MISSION OF SALEM MEN'S MISSION MEALS Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides meals three times per day. 777 Commercial Street NE Salem, OR 973010431 Eligibility: Men age 18 and older and men age 18 and older with minor children who are homeless Hours: 7 days per week 6:30am-7am, noon-12:30pm, 5:30pm-6pm Email (503) 362-3983 Get Directions Visit Website More Details UNION GOSPEL MISSION OF SALEM MEALS
